visuals.title: Q-Learning Update Diagram
visuals.description: Shows the flow from (S,A) to R and S', with arrow to max Q(S',a), illustrating the TD target calculation.

visuals.title: Q-Table Learning Over Time
visuals.description: Grid showing how Q-values evolve from random initialization to optimal values during training.

visuals.title: Off-Policy vs On-Policy
visuals.description: Comparison diagram showing behavior policy vs target policy in Q-learning (off) vs SARSA (on).
